name: How much money will I actually get every week while I'm off work?

mainEntity.name: How much money will I actually get every week while I'm off work?

acceptedAnswer.text: You will typically receive two-thirds (66.67%) of your average weekly wage, including overtime and bonuses, subject to state maximum caps. In Utah, you may also receive a small additional allowance for a spouse and dependent children.
